title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 383.040 - Medical malpractice association exempt from premium tax
text:
383.040.  Medical malpractice association exempt from premium tax. — No association organized pursuant to the provisions of sections 383.010 to 383.040 shall be required to pay any premium tax in connection with the conduct of its business.
(L. 1975 S.B. 458 § 7) 
Effective 6-26-75
